title: Mine Coins
description: MineCoin is a unique Minecraft mod that transforms the way players interact with currency. Instead of simple crafting recipes or modern ATM systems, MineCoin introduces a realistic blacksmithing process where coins are forged step by step
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4af93ac35e829b9048c3bda9379955d113d49e4b.webp)
- ## New items: 
  - Copper Coin
  - Iron Coin
  - Gold Coin
  - Diamond Coin
  - Emerald Coin
  - Netherite Coin
  - White Gloves

- ## Features:
  - Handling molten coins without gloves causes fire damage
  - Multi-Stage Coin Forging System

> Report a bug in [https://discord.gg/creativty-studio](https://discord.gg/NyhU8Et4gW) and we will reply as soon we can
